_credit.license: PixelLab Terms of Service — output may be used commercially in user projects. May NOT be used to train models.
_credit.prompt: small chubby round yellow chick baby bird, IMPORTANT: NOT a cat, NOT a four-legged animal, perfect round egg-shaped body like a chubby ball, two tiny black dot eyes on body, small triangular orange beak, two tiny thin orange feet sticking out below body, NO arms NO wings visible, just a round yellow ball with eyes and beak, classic chibi pixel art chick sprite like Pokémon Togepi or farm baby chicken, single black outline, simple flat colors, 3-color palette, minimalist 16-bit RPG NPC

_notes.paletteScheme: Quantised to PetPalettes index 7 (Lemon Yellow). Slots: 1=outline 2=primary 3=secondary 4=highlight 5=accent 6=pattern. Swap the palette block at render time to recolour.
_notes.mirrored: All frames mirrored horizontally during import (East-facing baseline; PixelLab west.png faces left).
_notes.groundOffsetsY: Per-stage feet-row index from the top of the 48-row canvas — used by PetStage to bottom-anchor sprites so all displayScales sit on the ground line correctly.
